creator: rea@FreeBSD.org
text:
Could you, please, try the patch from
  http://codelabs.ru/fbsd/patches/openssh/OpenSSH-fix-VersionAddendum-handling.diff

In a nutshell:
{{{
cd /usr/src
fetch -o ssh-addendum.diff http://codelabs.ru/fbsd/patches/openssh/OpenSSH-fix-VersionAddendum-handling.diff
patch -p1 < ssh-addendum.diff
cd secure/lib/libssh
make && make install && service sshd restart
}}}
should make your SSH to understand VersionAddendum again.

Had tested this both on -CURRENT, 9-STABLE and 8-STABLE:
works for me.

Dag-Erling, could you, please review this patch?

Thanks!
-- 
Eygene Ryabinkin                                        ,,,^..^,,,
[ Life's unfair - but root password helps!           | codelabs.ru ]
[ 82FE 06BC D497 C0DE 49EC  4FF0 16AF 9EAE 8152 ECFB | freebsd.org ]
